plan.summary: Keep the public python-audit.ts export path stable; move each audit check into its own adapter, centralize timeout execution and aggregation, and leave a thin orchestrator for index detection and scheduling.

extractions.unit: shared public result and internal check types
gate aggregation, scoring, and top risks

plan.dependency_impact: Existing register-tool-groups, lazy loader, and tests import pythonAudit from the facade. Keep named exports and Parameters<typeof pythonAudit> compatible.
plan.existing_reuse: Reuse existing source tools and their return shapes; no new audit semantics or parallelism policy.
plan.test_strategy: Keep existing suite, add characterization for secondary aggregation branches, then verify focused suite, lint, build, import-cycle/export parity, and full tests as environment allows.
